title: Chest Congestion Remedies for Smokers: 10 Herbal Tinctures
description: Echinacea purpurea tinctures can be a helpful remedy for chest congestion. This is because the plant contains compounds like alkylamides and glycosides that have anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds can help reduce swelling and ease congestion in the airways. Additionally, Echinacea purpurea contains volatile oils that act as expectorants, making it easier to cough up mucus.
